nodes.title: Create a bucket
nodes.summary: Provision a new storage bucket in the workspace.

nodes.title: Delete a bucket
nodes.summary: Remove an empty bucket from the workspace.

nodes.title: Get a bucket
nodes.summary: Fetch a single bucket descriptor by name.

nodes.title: List buckets
nodes.summary: List all buckets visible to the calling principal.

nodes.title: Delete an object
nodes.summary: Remove an object key from a bucket.

nodes.title: Download an object
nodes.summary: Fetch an object payload, optionally honoring a version selector.

nodes.title: List objects
nodes.summary: Enumerate objects in a bucket with optional prefix filtering.

nodes.title: Upload an object
nodes.summary: Stream a payload into a bucket under a chosen key.

nodes.title: Delete a webhook
nodes.summary: Remove a webhook subscription by id.

nodes.title: List webhooks
nodes.summary: Enumerate webhook subscriptions for the current project.

nodes.title: Register a webhook
nodes.summary: Subscribe a callback URL to bucket or object lifecycle events.

nodes.title: Changelog
nodes.summary: Release notes for the Tinybox SDK reference docs.

nodes.title: Authentication
nodes.summary: Bearer-token authentication and per-project scoping.

nodes.title: Data model
nodes.summary: Buckets, Objects, and Webhooks: the three top-level resources.

nodes.title: Buckets concept
nodes.summary: Buckets are regional containers that hold objects.

nodes.title: Lifecycle policies
nodes.summary: Automatic transitions between storage classes by age or tag.

nodes.title: Objects concept
nodes.summary: Objects are immutable byte sequences keyed within a bucket.

nodes.title: Your first project
nodes.summary: Walk through wiring a real application against Tinybox storage.

nodes.title: Install the SDK
nodes.summary: Install the Tinybox SDK via the package manager of your choice.

nodes.title: Quickstart
nodes.summary: Provision a bucket and upload your first object in under a minute.

nodes.title: Tinybox SDK overview
nodes.summary: Introduction to the Tinybox storage SDK: data model, capabilities, and a tour of the docs.
